CHART 170
The native has Mercury-Venus combination in Leo. He will be an
extraordinarily intelligent person. The Sun's conjunction with Mars indicates
reddish eyes. Moon is placed next to Saturn. So, he has eye troubles. The Sun
has Mercury-Venus next to him. Thus, the native's father will be favoured by
government and will have landed property, name and fame in his time.
Saturn's aspect on Venus got him a decen t job in government with many

Moon Dt and Rahu and then at the opposite
point Ketu. Jupiter is in Mars' house.
